name: NiziU Scout
overview: NizU Scout is a reality/variety show where the members of NiziU, Mako, Rio, Maya, Riku, Ayaka, Mayuka, Rima, Miihi and Nina go through various challenges and missions to earn a badge. The first member to earn 5 badges would be able to graduate from a NiziU Scout; furthermore, the member with the most medals would become the MVP and would receive a prize at the end.
